entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: audio
description: 在Remotion中使用音频和声音 - 导入、修剪、音量、速度、音高

entries.en-US: # Using audio in Remotion
entries.zh-Hans: # 在 Remotion 中使用音频

entries.en-US: ## Prerequisites
entries.zh-Hans: ## 先决条件

entries.en-US:
First, the @remotion/media package needs to be installed.
If it is not installed, use the following command:
entries.zh-Hans:
首先，需要安装 @remotion/media 包。
如果尚未安装，请使用以下命令：

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/media # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: ## Importing Audio
entries.zh-Hans: ## 导入音频

entries.en-US: Use `<Audio>` from `@remotion/media` to add audio to your composition.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用来自 `@remotion/media` 的 `<Audio>` 来向你的合成中添加音频。

entries.en-US: Remote URLs are also supported:
entries.zh-Hans: 也支持远程 URL：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Audio src="https://remotion.media/audio.mp3" />
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Audio src="https://remotion.media/audio.mp3" />
```

entries.en-US:
By default, audio plays from the start, at full volume and full length.
Multiple audio tracks can be layered by adding multiple `<Audio>` components.
entries.zh-Hans:
默认情况下，音频从开头开始播放，音量为全满，播放完整长度。
可以通过添加多个 `<Audio>` 组件来叠加多个音轨。

entries.en-US: ## Trimming
entries.zh-Hans: ## 修剪

entries.en-US: Use `trimBefore` and `trimAfter` to remove portions of the audio. Values are in frames.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `trimBefore` 和 `trimAfter` 来移除音频的部分片段。值以帧为单位。

entries.en-US: The audio still starts playing at the beginning of the composition - only the specified portion is played.
entries.zh-Hans: 音频仍然从合成的开头开始播放——只有指定的部分会被播放。

entries.en-US: ## Delaying
entries.zh-Hans: ## 延迟

entries.en-US: Wrap the audio in a `<Sequence>` to delay when it starts:
entries.zh-Hans: 将音频包裹在 `<Sequence>` 中以延迟其开始时间：

entries.en-US: The audio will start playing after 1 second.
entries.zh-Hans: 音频将在 1 秒后开始播放。

entries.en-US: ## Volume
entries.zh-Hans: ## 音量

entries.en-US: Set a static volume (0 to 1):
entries.zh-Hans: 设置静态音量（0 到 1）：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Audio src={staticFile("audio.mp3")} volume={0.5} />
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Audio src={staticFile("audio.mp3")} volume={0.5} />
```

entries.en-US: Or use a callback for dynamic volume based on the current frame:
entries.zh-Hans: 或者使用回调函数，根据当前帧动态调整音量：

entries.en-US: The value of `f` starts at 0 when the audio begins to play, not the composition frame.
entries.zh-Hans: `f` 的值从音频开始播放时为 0 开始计算，而不是合成帧。

entries.en-US: ## Muting
entries.zh-Hans: ## 静音

entries.en-US: Use `muted` to silence the audio. It can be set dynamically:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `muted` 来使音频静音。可以动态设置：

entries.en-US: ## Speed
entries.zh-Hans: ## 速度

entries.en-US: Use `playbackRate` to change the playback speed:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `playbackRate` 来改变播放速度：

entries.en-US: Reverse playback is not supported.
entries.zh-Hans: 不支持反向播放。

entries.en-US: ## Looping
entries.zh-Hans: ## 循环

entries.en-US: Use `loop` to loop the audio indefinitely:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `loop` 来无限循环音频：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Audio src={staticFile("audio.mp3")} loop />
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Audio src={staticFile("audio.mp3")} loop />
```

entries.en-US: Use `loopVolumeCurveBehavior` to control how the frame count behaves when looping:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `loopVolumeCurveBehavior` 来控制循环时帧计数的行为：

entries.en-US:
- `"repeat"`: Frame count resets to 0 each loop (default)
- `"extend"`: Frame count continues incrementing
entries.zh-Hans:
* `"repeat"`：每次循环帧计数重置为 0（默认）
* `"extend"`：帧计数继续递增

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Audio
  src={staticFile("audio.mp3")}
  loop
  loopVolumeCurveBehavior="extend"
  volume={(f) => interpolate(f, [0, 300], [1, 0])} // Fade out over multiple loops
/>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Audio
  src={staticFile("audio.mp3")}
  loop
  loopVolumeCurveBehavior="extend"
  volume={(f) => interpolate(f, [0, 300], [1, 0])} // Fade out over multiple loops
/>
```

entries.en-US: ## Pitch
entries.zh-Hans: ## 音高

entries.en-US: Use `toneFrequency` to adjust the pitch without affecting speed. Values range from 0.01 to 2:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `toneFrequency` 来调整音高而不影响速度。值范围从 0.01 到 2：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<Audio
  src={staticFile("audio.mp3")}
  toneFrequency={1.5} // Higher pitch
/>
<Audio
  src={staticFile("audio.mp3")}
  toneFrequency={0.8} // Lower pitch
/>
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<Audio
  src={staticFile("audio.mp3")}
  toneFrequency={1.5} // Higher pitch
/>
<Audio
  src={staticFile("audio.mp3")}
  toneFrequency={0.8} // Lower pitch
/>
```

entries.en-US: Pitch shifting only works during server-side rendering, not in the Remotion Studio preview or in the `<Player />`.
entries.zh-Hans: 音高变换仅在服务器端渲染时有效，在 Remotion Studio 预览或 `<Player />` 中无效。
